info.english_meaning: to understand to know to hurt to injure to cause trouble
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 1.1007 medf~ ityatra ' TAntAvimAviti svAmI DAntAviti nyAsaH ' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti
